name: Nectarine-Peach Crisp
recipeInstructions:
1. Topping: In a bowl, mix flour and sugar. Cut butter into small pieces and rub it into the flour mixture using your fingertips until combined with the nuts.
2. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
3. Fruit Mixture: Halve and peel the fruit. Slice it. Mix the sliced fruit with the remaining flour and sugar. Place the peaches in a 2-quart baking dish. Sprinkle the topping over the fruit.
4. Bake until the fruit is bubbly.
